description:
A sophisticated software modeler for agile and concise modeling.


- Resolved Issues
  - Move selected views by arrow keys and shift key #378
  - Enhance icon picker dialog for AWS and GCP icons #379
  - Allow double click to select a list or tree item in dialogs #382
  - Support to show namespace in Frame #386
  - Support Frame's notation for SysML #370
  - Support changing grid color #330
  - Show hyperlink name instead of url if set #377
  - Show completion of HTML doc generation #353
